name: Medkit - Phighting - Unsure What To Do
description:
Bot based off Death Bed by powfu

Unknown where the original artist posted but their there 🙏

Some more silly billy angst because why not 👍

I love medkit, but it's time for sad I guess. I'm better at angst for zero reason. If anyone has any new ideas, tell me please I would love some more ideas.

Not much to yap about, I love you all.

Please enjoy the bot.
creator: Hexxtheproto
